backup.framework.FrameworkControls.Docs: Contains detailed information about all of the controls of a framework. Each framework must contain at least one control.

backup.framework.FrameworkDescription.Docs: An optional description of the framework with a maximum 1,024 characters.

backup.framework.FrameworkName.Docs: The unique name of a framework. This name is between 1 and 256 characters, starting with a letter, and consisting of letters (a-z, A-Z), numbers (0-9), and underscores (_).

backup.framework.FrameworkTags.Docs: A list of tags with which to tag your framework.
